zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Prence Sr.於1574年1月29日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯時，他的父親Thomas Prince III24歲，母親Elizabeth Maxham22歲。他於1597年1月與Elizabeth Ann Todlerby在英國格盧斯特斯爾諾瑟利亞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1630年8月14日在英國米德萊可哥吉拉 哈洛福-比--度維爾享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦巴爾金 安德 達根哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Prence Sr.于1574年1月29日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯时，他的父亲Thomas Prince III24岁，母亲Elizabeth Maxham22岁。他于1597年1月与Elizabeth Ann Todlerby在英国格盧斯特斯爾諾瑟利亞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1630年8月14日在英国米德萊可哥吉拉 哈洛福-比--度維爾享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦巴爾金 安德 達根哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Prence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): nickname from Middle English praunce ‘to prance’, no doubt with reference to the bearer's gait or attitude.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Prence Sr. was born on 29 January 1574, in Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Prince III, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Maxham, was 22. He married Elizabeth Ann Todlerby in January 1597, in Northleach, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 14 August 1630, in All Hallows-by-the-Tower, Middlesex, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Barking and Dagenham, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Prence Sr. est né le 29 janvier 1574, à Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Prince III, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Maxham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Ann Todlerby en janvier 1597, à Northleach, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 14 août 1630, à All Hallows-by-the-Tower, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Barking and Dagenham, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat im Januar 1597 in Northleach, Gloucestershire, England Elizabeth Ann Todlerby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 14. August 1630 im Alter von 56 Jahren in All Hallows-by-the-Tower, Middlesex, England und wurde in Barking and Dagenham, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Prence Sr.が1574年1月29日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスで生まれた時，父Thomas Prince IIIは24歳，母Elizabeth Maxhamは22歳であった。1597年1月にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアノースレアチでElizabeth Ann Todlerbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年8月14日にイギリスミッドレセックスアル ハロウス-ブイ-スエ-トウエルで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンバーキング アンド ダジェンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Barking, Greater London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 바킨그 앤드 다겐함
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Prence Sr.(이)가 1574년 1월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Prince III(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Maxham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1597년 1월 영국 그루스스터실르 노르슬리치에서 Elizabeth Ann Todlerby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년 8월 14일 영국 미들레세스 앨 핼로스-비-테-타워에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 바킨그 앤드 다겐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Prence Sr. nasceu em 29 de janeiro de 1574, em Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Prince III, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Maxham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Ann Todlerby em janeiro de 1597, em Northleach, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1630, em All Hallows-by-the-Tower, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Barking and Dagenham, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Barking, Greater London, England: баркинг анд дадженам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Prence Sr. родился 29 января 1574 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Prince III было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Maxham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Ann Todlerby январь 1597 г. в местности нортлич, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 14 августа 1630 г. в местности алл холлоус-би-те-тоуир, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности баркинг анд дадженам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
